titleStmt.title: SII 28.126: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 126. (A.R. No. 281 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall.
The right end of the inscription is built in.

It records a royal order approving the arrangements made for raising a flower-garden (tirunandavanam) called Śivatavaṉapperumāḷ-tiru-nandavanam in Rājasūrya-nallūr, a hamlet of Agaram Rājasūryya-chcharuppēdimaṅgalam and for providing for the upkeep (ilakkai and koṟṟu) of those tending the garden and supplying flowers to the tiruppū-maṇḍapam (of God Āḷuḍaiyār) with the yield of 27 vēli and odd of land in Vaḍanālūr alias Viśvādhikavivēka-maṅgalam purchased and gifted by the donor. The latter was to be the kāṇi of those tending the garden and they had to pay kaḍamai and kuḍimai (the two types of taxes on land) on that land. The proceeds of these taxes were to be the tirunāmattukkāṇi of God Āḷuḍaiya-nāyaṉār. The balance of yield of the land after the appropriation for the ilakkai and koṟṟu of the persons (five in number ?) tending the garden and for payment of taxes as stated above, was to be the capital (uḍal) as tiruppāvāḍaippuṟam for feeding in the tiruppāvāḍai (?) on the day of the astarism pūśam in month of Tai. Though from the naming of the garden, it appears that Ārayaṉ Śivatavanapperumāṉ alias Kāliṅgarāyaṉ was the donor, the gaps in information due to loss in the built-in portion, makes a cogent understanding of the other details of the transaction difficult.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svastiśrī § tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu pattu nāḷ Irunūṟṟu muppattaiñcu § toṇṭaimāṉum tirumañcaṉamaḻakiyāṉum teṉṉavaṉ bra
koyilukku śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum sāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum ceyyat tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi poṉ Āḷu�
vaḷanāṭṭu Amparnāṭṭu Ampāruvantai Arayaṉ niṟaṇi pavaḻakkuṉṟaṉāṉa kāliṅkarāyaṉum Arayaṉ Ātiyāḻvāṉāṉa kāliṅkarāyaṉum rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭup perumpaṟṟappuliyūrp piṭā�
Orumānilam tirunantavaṉamākac ceyvitta Itukkut tiruppaḷḷittāmam Aḷantu varukiṟa tiraimuruṭaiyāṉ vantāṉa tevarkaḷ tevaṉukkum kovalūruṭaiyāṉ tiruñāṉacampantaṉukkum Ilakkaikkum koṟṟuk
kuṭuttu Ivarkaḷ per Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukkuk kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyāka vanta tiruppaḷḷittāmam Aḷantu vārā niṉṟārkaḷeṉṟum Arayaṉ Irācarāca tevaṉāṉa vāṇādhirājaṉukku Iraṇṭu perum Arayaṉ tiruvalañcuḻi U�
Arayaṉ civatavaṉapperumāṉāṉa kāliṅkarāyaṉukku muṉṟu perum Ivaṉ mātā Āḷavantāḷukku Iraṇṭu perum Ivaṉ makaṉ Irācarāca tevaṉukku Iraṇṭu perum mutal koṇṭu Ipperkkuk kūṟṟāṅkiḻa
nampiyum tirunaṭṭap perumāṉum Iraiyūruṭaiyāṉ poṉṉampalak kūttaṉum mayilāppuṭaiyāṉ Umaiyuruka Āṭuvāṉum tiraimuruṭaiyāṉ tumpikkaiyaṉum Āka Eḻu per Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉā
ttaṉum melūruṭaiyāṉ niṉṟayaṅkiyāṭuvāṉum velūr kiḻavaṉ tirumañcaṉamaḻakiyāṉum kūṟṟāṅkiḻāṉ Aṉumīśvaramuṭaiyāṉum kuṇavāyiluṭaiyāṉ tirunaṭṭap perumāṉum Āka Aiñcu per tiruk
per Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukkuk kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyāka vanta tiruppaḷḷittāmam tiruppū maṇṭapattukku mutalāka Aḷakkavum Itukku Iṉṉāṭṭu veṇṇaiyūrṉāṭṭu rājasūryyaccaruppetimaṅkalattu kāliṅ
Iraṇṭu mākkāṇiyum tirunantavaṉamākac ceyyavum vaṭanālūrāṉa viśvādhikavivekamaṅkalattu Ivaṉ vilaikoṇṭa pottakappaṭi nilam Irupatteḻe Iraṇṭumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaik
Eḻe Iraṇṭumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ mukkāle muṉṟu mānilam Ivarkaḷukkuk kāṇiyāyk kaṭamai kuṭimai Iṟuttu mikuti Ivarkaḷukku Ilakkaikkum koṟṟukkum Iṉṉilam nikki
Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉārkkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāyk kaṭamai kuṭimai Iṟuttu mikuti taimmāsattup pūcattu nāḷ tiruppāvāṭaiyil Amutu ceytaruḷat tiruppāvāṭaip puṟamākavum ku
pala varavai Uṭaṉe kūṭṭavum vilai koṇṭa pramāṇaṅkaḷ tirukkaioṭṭiyile Oṭukkavum Ippaṭikkuk kulottuṅka coḻaṉ tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavum kaṭavatākap
ccoṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyak kaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyyap paṇṇuvatu Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraolai neṟivuṭaiccoḻamuventa veḷāṉeṉṟum Ippaṭi tiruva
yaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai viḻuppādhirājaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai cetikularāyaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai Ilaṅkeśvaraṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai Amarakoṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai kāṅ
ceytaruḷi vanta ceyyum paṭiyum Akaram rājasūryyac caruppetimaṅkalattup piṭākai rājasūryyanallūrpāl civatavaṉapperumāḷ tirunantavaṉameṉṉum perāṟ ceyta śrīdevapati
kālukku vaṭakku 2kū� catirattuk kiḻakkaṭaiya rūpāy Ü nīkki Itaṉmeṟku rūpāy � Itil teṉkiḻakkaṭaiya rūpāy 1kāṇi nīkki nīkki rūpāy Orumā kṛūm 2 catirattu rūpāy Üm Ākattirunantavaṉa nilam simm
Āṟṟukkum kiḻakkum Ivvāṟṟil talaipeṟṟu Aravaṇai vāykkāluṟṟa teruvil vāykkālukkut teṟkum Inta Aravaṇai vāykkālukkum naṭuvil māttūrellaikkum meṟkum kumārarukku
vāykkālukku vaṭakkum naṭuvupaṭṭa vaṭanālūr pottakappaṭi rūpāy 2 10 9 Iraṇṭumā ¿ 1muntiri � ¬ mukkāl � Itil muttaḷiśvaramuṭaiyārkkum tiruvakattiśvaramuṭaiyārkkum tevatāṉam potta
vekamaṅkalam pottakappaṭi 100 3 10 5 � ¿ 1muntiri ¬� mukkāl � Itil 7 � ¿ 1muntiri ¬ mukkāl � nilam kaṭamai Iṟuttu Iṟaimikuti tirunantavaṉakkuṭikaḷukku Ilakkaiḷukkum koṟṟukkum nikki nilam
vuḷḷatu tiruttaippūcat tirunāḷil tiruppāvāṭai Amutu ceytaruḷa veṇṭuvaṉavaiyiṟṟukkum Uṭalākavum Āka rūpāy 2 10 7�vum tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṭṭa pa
vaṉapperumāṉāṉa kāliṅkarāyar Eḻuttiṭṭa pramāṇamum Iṉṉilaṅkaḷ vilai koṇṭa pramāṇaṅkaḷum tirukkai Oṭṭiyil Oṭukkiṉamaikkuk kalveṭṭiyatu poṉ
Digital edition of SII 28.126 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
